title: Copy an item into multiple groups on the same board.
excerpt: Our company is hosting an event that has drawings for multiple items. We’re using this to gauge interest in internal products. I’m looking to create an automation that would copy an item and place it in a group, based on…

posts.author: nkauer (Kole Kauer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our company is hosting an event that has drawings for multiple items. We’re using this to gauge interest in internal products. I’m looking to create an automation that would copy an item and place it in a group, based on a dropdown selection on a form. This form allows users to select multiple items. For example, if they select to enter drawings 1, 3 and 5 on the form, then the item would appear in each of the groups 1, 3 and 5. I’ve tried to create an automation like this but it loops infinitely.

This would be a similar function to duplicating an item and placing it on another board, except it would duplicate the item and place in group in the same board.
